resolvedDuringReview.finding: JSON null was accepted by slice unmarshalling as an empty spatial result set despite the beta.147 bare-array-only contract.
resolvedDuringReview.resolution: A failing-first null and whitespace-null regression test was captured; runSpatialQuery now rejects any response whose first non-whitespace token is not '[' before strict array decoding.

conclusions.spatialWireContract: approved: success accepts only the beta.147 bare JSON array; classified failures are interpreted from ADR-060 headers through natsclient.ClassifyReply
conclusions.noLegacyMigrationCode: approved: no pre-beta response envelope, body-text error parser, predicate alias, or compatibility fallback exists in the reviewed integration
conclusions.publicProjection: approved: Point writes use vocabulary.GeoLocationLongitude, vocabulary.GeoLocationLatitude, and vocabulary.GeoLocationAltitude
conclusions.ownedRoundTripContract: approved: sensorml.process.position remains the separate lossless CS API and SensorML geometry contract and is not an index input alias
conclusions.writeCoverage: approved: System Feature and SensorML builders, Deployment and Sampling Feature creates, and PATCH replacement are directly covered; PUT calls the same tested System Feature builder and forwards its triples unchanged through replace or upsert
conclusions.patchStaleness: approved: any non-null geometry replacement removes longitude, latitude, and altitude before appending a valid Point projection; Polygon replacement leaves no stale coordinates
conclusions.noCentroid: approved: only a valid geojson.Point projects coordinates; Polygon and all other geometry types remain round-trip data without an invented centroid
conclusions.errorMapping: approved: Invalid, Transient, and Fatal classified spatial replies map to 400, 503, and 500; malformed success payloads map to 500
conclusions.entityNotFound: approved: 404 promotion requires graph.ErrorCodeEntityNotFound; uncoded body text remains Invalid
conclusions.tddIntegrity: approved: the original response/projection/not-found red evidence and reviewer-found null red evidence are recorded separately and honestly
conclusions.conformanceIntegrity: approved: the reviewed bundle does not remove claims, add skips, disable tests, or modify the external ETS

limits.reason: Approval is limited to the signed spatial implementation bundle. Operator rehearsal and the external zero-failure/zero-skip conformance gate remain separate requirements.
